description: Allowlisted registry from invariant ID to repository gate IDs. Gate argv is fixed here; markdown never becomes shell.

ledger-paths.description: Backticked repo-relative anchors in the ledger still exist on disk.

app-mcp-cli-direct-writes.description: App, MCP, and CLI product surfaces do not open direct SQLite writers.

indexing-test-double-boundaries.description: Indexing test doubles stay out of product target sources.

stage3-daemon-cutover.description: Migrated Stage 3 surfaces no longer use legacy daemon transport.

swift-module-boundaries.description: Swift module import boundaries stay enforced.

swift-conventions.description: Swift convention gate (nonisolated reads, no hashValue cache keys).
